# TranscriptG Toolkit

> 100% Free YouTube Transcript Generator, AI Summarizer, and Content Repurposing Toolkit.

TranscriptG is an optimized full-stack suite of tools to extract high-accuracy text transcripts from public YouTube videos, generate structural chapter indexes, produce clean AI-powered article drafts, and manage metadata.

## Core Capabilities

- **YouTube Transcript Grabber**: High-precision frame-synchronized subtitle fetching for public video assets.
- **AI Summarization & Chapters**: Structured key takeaways, summaries, and timestamped chapter indexes.
- **YouTube to Blog Post**: Conversion of speech into SEO-optimized long-form articles.
- **Shorts Clipper & Hooks**: Identify virality triggers, high-retention hooks, and video segmentation logs.
- **SEO & Keyword Extraction**: Parse high-impact search keywords and semantic concepts.
